name: edulia
description: Open-source school management platform — a modern alternative to École Directe and Pronote. Unified support for K-12 schools and tutoring centers.

scripts.start:api: cd apps/api && source ../.venv/bin/activate && set -a && source ../.env && set +a && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
